Description_fr: Un complexe hotelier et spa prime a Orlando proposant des soins de bien-etre, un parcours de golf et une cuisine raffinee.

Description: This pioneering eco-friendly hotel in Miami is built from reclaimed timber and recycled steel. The living green wall in the atrium naturally purifies indoor air, while the kitchen composts one hundred percent of food waste. Description_fr: Un hotel ecologique certifie a Miami alliant durabilite et confort haut de gamme.
